overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia descending a cliffside cable car at night during light snowfall, then walking through a snow-dusted harbor village with medieval stone buildings, wooden docks, and warm lantern lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliffside cable car descent between rock faces

events.description: cable car begins descent down the steep cliff face
snow begins to fall visibly around the cable car

agents.ego_description: Geralt stands on the cable car platform looking out at the distant village lights while descending the mountain cliff

entered.detail: steep gray rock wall passing close to the left side of the cable car
steep gray rock wall passing close to the right side with rough texture
wooden planks and railings of the cable car that Geralt stands upon
thick metal cables extending upward into the darkness above
warm orange lights from buildings visible far below in the valley

segments.scene_description: Geralt rides a wooden cable car descending between narrow cliff faces at night. Snow begins to fall as the car moves downward, with distant village lights visible far below. The rocky walls pass closely on both sides in the dim blue moonlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: cable car station platform at cliff top

events.description: cable car arrives at the wooden station platform built into the cliff
Geralt steps off the cable car and begins walking down wooden stairs

agents.ego_description: Geralt disembarks from the cable car and walks down wooden stairs toward the harbor level

notable_agents.action: guard in red cloak and helmet standing near a barrel with a lit lantern

entered.detail: planked arrival platform with wooden railings built against the cliff
rough stone wall of the station structure with wooden door frame
stack of wooden barrels near the platform edge
bright warm lantern illuminating the platform area

segments.scene_description: The cable car arrives at a wooden station platform built into the cliffside. Geralt steps off and passes a guard in red clothing standing near a lantern. He then descends wooden stairs, with the harbor water becoming visible below.

events.description: snowfall intensifies slightly as Geralt walks along the open dock
moving from open waterfront into narrower village street with market stalls

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks steadily along the wooden harbor docks, passing fishing equipment and stone buildings while snow falls gently

notable_agents.action: villager in dark clothing walking along the dock carrying a torch

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks of the harbor walkway extending along the water
small stone building with lit windows and wooden door
thick coils of rope stacked on the dock edge
large wooden cage structure possibly for fishing or storage
bare tree branches silhouetted against the night sky
wooden table with goods and pottery displayed for sale

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along the snow-dusted wooden harbor docks, passing stone fishing huts and wooden cages used for fishing. Warm lantern light spills from building windows, contrasting with the cold blue night. He passes a villager carrying a torch and continues through the village, eventually reaching a narrow street with a market stall displaying goods.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a descent between towering cliffs into the heart of a snow-dusted harbor village at night. It begins with Geralt riding a wooden cable car downward through narrow rocky walls under dim blue moonlight as light snow starts to fall. As the car reaches a cliffside station, the camera follows him past a guard in red clothing and down a set of wooden stairs toward the glimmering harbor water below. The scene then shifts to the wooden docks, where the cold blue atmosphere is punctuated by warm lantern light spilling from stone fishing huts and the glow of a villager's torch. Finally, the movement leads through the village past fishing cages and into a narrow street, ending at a market stall displaying various goods.
